# HeadySystems Inc.

> The World's First Sovereign AI Operating System — φ-scaled swarm intelligence with Continuous Semantic Logic (CSL), 17 Swarm Matrix, and 89 specialized bee types.

HeadySystems Inc. is a Colorado C-Corp (EIN 41-3412204) building Heady™, an autonomous AI orchestration platform. Sister nonprofit: HeadyConnection Inc. (EIN 41-3508351, 501(c)(3) pending).

## Core Technology
- [Heady™ Latent-Space OS Architecture](/docs/architecture.md): 5-layer orchestration, 22-stage HCFP pipeline, sacred geometry φ-scaled routing.
- [Continuous Semantic Logic (CSL)](/docs/csl.md): Cosine similarity gates replacing if/else boolean logic. 0.0–1.0 continuous scoring across 1536-dimensional vector space.
- [17 Swarm Matrix](/docs/swarms.md): 89 bee types across 17 swarms. Specialized AI sub-agents with emergent orchestration.
- [HeadyMCP](/docs/mcp.md): 31 MCP tools via Model Context Protocol. Live at headymcp.com.

## Products
- [HeadyBuddy](/products/headybuddy): Personal AI companion with persistent cross-domain memory.
- [HeadyBot](/products/headybot): Autonomous bot framework for business process automation.
- [HeadyAPI](/products/api): REST + GraphQL API with usage-based metering.

## Legal & IP
- 60+ provisional patents covering AI orchestration, swarm intelligence, PQC, and spatial computing.
- Patent portfolio valued $4.2M–$12.8M.
